HGSS.445.0000:
Hey, kid! I just had a double shot
of espresso, and I am wired!\f
I need to talk to someone, so you’ll
have to do!\f
I might not look like much now, but
I was an expert at catching Pokémon.\f
Do you believe me? [0200,0000]
HGSS.445.0001:
Good, good. Yes, I was something out
of the ordinary, let me tell you!
HGSS.445.0002:
What? You little whelp!\f
If I were just a bit younger, I’d
show you a thing or two. Humph!
HGSS.445.0003:
This Gym didn’t have a Leader...\f
A young man from Pallet Town became the
Leader, but he’s often away.
HGSS.445.0004:
How was it?
Were you able to battle the Leader?
HGSS.445.0005:
Yawn!
I must have dozed off in the sun.\f
...I had this dream about a DROWZEE
eating my dream.\f
Weird, huh?\r
Huh?\r
What’s this?\f
Where did this TM come from?
This is spooky!\r
Here, you can have this TM.\f
HGSS.445.0007:
I heard that there are many items on
the ground in Viridian Forest.
HGSS.445.0008:
Viridian City
The City of Evergreen
HGSS.445.0009:
Viridian City Pokémon Gym
Leader: ...\r
The rest of the text is illegible...
HGSS.445.0010:
Welcome to Viridian City,
the Gateway to Indigo Plateau!
